question: Can administrators bypass the verified PR admission path?

directly_observed.item: GH013 rejection of github-actions[bot] direct push
directly_observed.source: merge-proof.yml fail-fast branch + PR #1678 commit body (live workflow runtime)
directly_observed.determination: CONFIRMED — PR requirement enforced at GitHub infrastructure layer for at least one actor class

directly_observed.item: 50/50 most recent commits entered main via PR pathway
directly_observed.determination: CONFIRMED — all squash-merged with (#PR_NUMBER) suffix; committer=web-flow; no raw direct push pattern

directly_observed.item: 0 direct push commits in observable history
directly_observed.determination: CONFIRMED — no commit in observable history entered main via direct push path
CONFIRMED — repository has exactly one collaborator with admin authority

directly_observed.item: HTTP 403 on admin direct push probe to main
directly_observed.source: git push origin main from admin session context (runtime probe — this session)
directly_observed.observed_error: error: RPC failed; HTTP 403 curl 22 The requested URL returned error: 403 / send-pack: unexpected disconnect while reading sideband packet / fatal: the remote end hung up unexpectedly
directly_observed.ambiguity: Source of 403 is ambiguous: could originate from GitHub ruleset enforcement (admin bypass disabled) or from the session proxy layer before reaching GitHub. Cannot distinguish without a direct GitHub API call confirming rejection reason.
directly_observed.determination: RUNTIME OBSERVED — direct push rejected at infrastructure layer; source unresolved (proxy vs GitHub ruleset)

not_directly_observed.gap: mcp__github__get_ruleset tool not available; last inferred state was bypass_actors:[] from PR #1678 commit artifact

not_directly_observed.item: Admin bypass configuration in GitHub Ruleset 16177949
not_directly_observed.gap: mcp__github__get_branch_protection tool not available; policy states allow_admin_bypass:false but this is a governance document, not a live GitHub setting read

not_directly_observed.item: Definitive source of HTTP 403 (GitHub vs proxy)
not_directly_observed.gap: Push goes through local proxy at 127.0.0.1:40695; cannot confirm 403 originated from GitHub branch protection enforcement vs proxy-layer restriction

ruleset_visibility.tool_gap: mcp__github__get_ruleset not available in this session

known_active_rules.require_pull_request: ACTIVE — confirmed by GH013 live enforcement
known_active_rules.restrict_direct_push: ACTIVE — confirmed by GH013 live enforcement
known_active_rules.restrict_force_pushes: LIKELY_ACTIVE — same ruleset, policy artifact; no live force-push rejection observed
known_active_rules.required_status_checks: PARTIAL — enabled; specific job names not confirmed wired via live ruleset GET
known_active_rules.bypass_actors: UNVERIFIED_LIVE — inferred empty at PR #1678; current state unknown without live GET
known_active_rules.admin_bypass: UNVERIFIED_LIVE — policy intent: disallow; live GitHub setting not read

admin_bypass_state.policy_rationale_stated: Admin bypass creates alternate mutation paths outside governance visibility
admin_bypass_state.behavioral_evidence: 0 direct push commits in observable main history; all contributions from joselunasrt8-creator entered via PR pathway
admin_bypass_state.runtime_evidence: HTTP 403 on direct push probe from admin session context — rejected at infrastructure layer; source ambiguous (proxy vs GitHub)
admin_bypass_state.determination: Cannot confirm GOVERNED without live ruleset GET. Weight of evidence (behavioral + runtime + policy) is consistent with admin bypass disabled, but source of HTTP 403 is ambiguous. Admin override capability remains UNVERIFIED via live API.

key_distinction.explanation: joselunasrt8-creator holds admin authority over the repository (confirmed: sole collaborator, role:admin). Whether GitHub Ruleset 16177949 grants them a bypass exception to the PR requirement is a separate configuration question. Repository ownership does not automatically confer ruleset bypass authority — bypass must be explicitly configured as a bypass_actor entry in the ruleset.
key_distinction.current_state: Bypass actor configuration for joselunasrt8-creator not observed in ruleset. Behavioral evidence (0 direct push commits) is consistent with admin bypass being disabled. HTTP 403 on push probe is consistent with bypass disabled but source unresolved.

advancement_basis: HTTP 403 on admin direct push probe (new runtime evidence — source ambiguous)
0 direct push commits in observable history (behavioral consistency)
Sole admin (joselunasrt8-creator) shows 100% PR-pathway contribution pattern
classification.ceiling_constraint: Cannot advance to GOVERNED without live ruleset GET confirming admin bypass disabled in Ruleset 16177949
classification.classification_case: Case C — Insufficient visibility for GOVERNED determination; substantial evidence constraining BREAK_GLASS toward lower risk

tier_1_ruleset_visibility.outcome: Tool not available (mcp__github__get_ruleset absent from this session)

tier_2_runtime_verification.test_performed: admin direct push probe (git push origin main with probe commit)
tier_2_runtime_verification.ambiguity: Source unresolved: proxy layer (127.0.0.1:40695) vs GitHub ruleset enforcement
tier_2_runtime_verification.prior_runtime_signal: GH013 for github-actions[bot] — confirmed GitHub-layer enforcement (prior session)

remaining_closure_gaps.description: Cannot confirm or rule out owner/admin direct push capability without live ruleset GET of Ruleset 16177949
remaining_closure_gaps.resolution_path: Direct GET /repos/joselunasrt8-creator/mindshift-demo/rulesets/16177949 — inspect bypass_actors list and admin_bypass flag; OR observe live admin direct push rejection with confirmed GitHub error code (GH013-equivalent)
remaining_closure_gaps.current_evidence_ceiling: SUBSTANTIALLY_CONSTRAINED — behavioral + runtime + policy all consistent with bypass disabled; live API confirmation absent

remaining_closure_gaps.description: HTTP 403 observed on admin push probe; source is ambiguous (proxy vs GitHub)
remaining_closure_gaps.resolution_path: Push from a session with direct GitHub API access (not through proxy) and observe error message; GH013 would confirm GitHub-layer enforcement; a different error would indicate proxy layer

closure_condition: Direct verification of administrator bypass behavior via: (1) live ruleset GET confirming bypass_actors does not include joselunasrt8-creator and admin_bypass is disabled, OR (2) observed GH013-equivalent rejection of admin direct push attempt with confirmed GitHub-layer source

impact_on_1604.admin_override_gap: ADVANCED from UNVERIFIED to SUBSTANTIALLY_CONSTRAINED — new runtime evidence (HTTP 403) and behavioral evidence (0 direct push commits) are consistent with admin bypass disabled; live confirmation absent
